executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned verification is healthy, but the marketing owner loop remains red on independent verification while outcome evidence is still measurement-pending.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Wait for the active marketing measurement hold to mature, then rerun the marketing bundle and independent verification on fresh outcome evidence instead of recertifying flat-adoption activity.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus current owner-loop artifacts

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Marketing is the remaining live red owner loop
findings.mechanism: marketing independent verifier still fails and the workflow audit still marks the repair window as measurement_pending after a fresh marketing bundle rerun.
findings.root_cause: Primary-repo adoption is still flat, Reddit execution remains blocked, and the refreshed marketing run re-entered a measurement hold instead of producing outcome movement.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the active hold window mature, then rerun the marketing bundle and independent verifier on fresh outcome evidence.

findings.title: Docs owner loop is green and stable again
findings.mechanism: docs independent verifier is pass and the recent stability window remains green after the stale runner artifact was refreshed.
findings.root_cause: The docs supervisor cleared the prior failure pattern and the current verifier state is both pass and stable.
findings.recommended_fix: No architecture-side repair needed; keep treating docs as independently owned and green unless newer docs evidence regresses.

findings.title: Architecture audit metadata matches the current live cron topology
findings.mechanism: live runtime reports 21 enabled jobs, zero live-disabled jobs, zero running jobs, and zero last-error residue.
findings.root_cause: The audit is now anchored to live Gateway state instead of persisted-history conflation.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep refreshing architecture artifacts from live cron state before verifier signoff.

findings.title: One-shot measurement-release routing remains explicitly targeted
findings.mechanism: The temporary marketing-measurement-hold-release job still resolves to an explicit Matrix room target.
findings.root_cause: One-shot delivery needs explicit routing to avoid fail-closed execution.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep one-shot follow-up jobs on explicit delivery targets or delivery.mode=none so they cannot fail closed at execution time.

findings.title: Live scheduler is otherwise clean
findings.mechanism: 21 live jobs, 21 enabled, 0 disabled, no live last-error residue.
findings.root_cause: Current cron state is stable at inspection time.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture artifacts aligned with live scheduler topology and current owner-loop evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: This run refreshed stale marketing verification evidence, reran loop integrity, and revalidated current cron topology.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Prevents stale signoff and keeps blocker localization tied to current runtime truth.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Let the active marketing measurement hold mature, then rerun marketing independent verification on fresh evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing remains the only live owner-loop red domain after the refreshed bundle rerun.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the last owner-loop blocker or produces new evidence for a tactic change.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun architecture signoff after the next fresh marketing evidence point lands
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Architecture is already localized; the next meaningful state change is marketing outcome evidence.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Produces a qualified_pass or pass tied to a real blocker transition instead of stale churn.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Replaced the stale marketing independent-verification artifact with a fresh fail-closed result that matches the current measurement-pending state.
Reran loop integrity; docs runner stale artifact was refreshed and the marketing bundle was rerun so loop-level evidence is current.

repairs_applied_this_run.target: health monitor + architecture independent verifier + verifier markdown
repairs_applied_this_run.change: Reran health_monitor.py, then refreshed architecture independent verification and verifier output against the updated evidence set.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass after the active measurement hold yields new outcome evidence.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: The architecture path can localize this blocker, but it cannot certify marketing healthy until the primary-repo measurement window produces a real delta or new failure evidence.

notes: Architecture green here means architecture-owned verification is healthy and correctly localizing blockers; it does not mean the full system is globally green.
Persisted disabled jobs are history only; live disabled jobs are zero.
Docs is green; marketing remains the only live owner-loop red domain.
Independent signoff was rerun after the live topology and owner-loop refresh in this watchdog pass.
The one-shot marketing measurement release job still holds an explicit Matrix room delivery target.
